channel.title: All Registered Polls for the European Parliament
channel.description: All Registered Polls for the European Parliament

item.title: Opinion Poll by ARP, 1–10 April 2026 – Seating Plan Projection
item.description:
Seating plan projection for the European Parliament
17 seats needed for a majority
Opinion poll by ARP, 1–10 April 2026
Details on https://filipvanlaenen.github.io/romanian_ep_polls/2026-04-10-ARP.html
